title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at KPIT Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at KPIT Technologies
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
